name: pviz
description: Polyglot dependency analysis for your workspace. Generates LLM-optimized architecture bundles via the PViz CLI.

pviz.outputFile.description: Output JSON file for the generated PViz bundle. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root. The extension automatically passes --allow-output-in-repo when the output file is inside the workspace.

pviz.cliPath.description: Path to the PViz CLI executable. Defaults to 'pviz' (assumes it is on your PATH).

pviz.mode.description: PViz analyzer mode. 'zones' is recommended for most projects.

pviz.maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes per file passed to PViz (default: 100MB).

pviz.storeRoot.description: Optional external PViz store root. Leave empty to use the CLI default.

pviz.clean.description: Delete sandbox artifacts before analysis to avoid stale cross-repo reuse. Recommended to keep true.

pviz.additionalArgs.description: Additional raw arguments passed to the PViz CLI.
